shared_properties: Timing UI stays centered on the lower screen and uses exact 600x30 px frame bounds declared in the GDD.
Judgement zones use fixed hex colors for Perfect, Good, and neutral rails.
differences: This sheet provides two pulse frames for the reflection bar that marks Perfect and Good timing windows.

reference_images.label: Reflect Academy GDD
reference_images.purpose: 600x30 timing bar size, Perfect and Good window rule, and lower-center anchor grounding.

reference_images.label: Reflect Academy moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Bar glow intensity and contrast against the hall floor grounding.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use TextureAtlasLayout with two 600x30 frames and swap frames on a short pulse timer while projectiles are active.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/timing_reflection_judgement_bar.png through AssetServer and keep the atlas handle in the HUD state resource.
runtime_notes: Frame width is 600 px and frame height is 30 px.
Perfect zone width is 96 px centered inside the bar.
Good zones are 144 px wide on both sides of the Perfect zone.

context.role: Lower-center timing bar that displays Perfect and Good windows during projectile approach.
context.usage: Visible only while at least one projectile is traveling toward the player.

deliverables.notes: Two-frame pulse atlas for the 600x30 timing bar.

acceptance_criteria: Sheet size is exactly 1200x30 px with two 600x30 frames laid left to right.
Perfect zone width is exactly 96 px and both Good zones are exactly 144 px wide in each frame.
Only #00FFFF, #ADFF2F, #D4AF37, #1A1A2E, and #E74C3C are used for visible pixels.
